summary: Renderer crashes when opened outside Electron shell because IPC bridge is undefined
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Start app with npm run dev 2. Open http://localhost:5173 in browser automation 3. Observe blank screen and console errors from workspace/shortcuts/ACP IPC services
expected_result: Automation should be able to reach a testable app surface or the renderer should fail gracefully with a clear unsupported-environment state
actual_result: Page renders blank and throws TypeError on undefined IPC bridge methods such as getInitialState, onActionTriggered, onAcpEvent, listExtensions, getPiConfigSnapshot
console_errors: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading getInitialState); TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading onActionTriggered); TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading onAcpEvent); TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading listExtensions); TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading getPiConfigSnapshot)
app_state: npm run dev active; Electron launched separately but not controllable from browser automation surface
notes: This blocks end-to-end UI testing from the available in-app browser automation. Need either Electron-driver support or a browser-test harness with mocked preload APIs.

summary: Automation-launched Electron process reaches app ready state but never creates a BrowserWindow
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Keep normal dev session running 2. Launch npm run qa:electron-smoke 3. Harness starts a second Electron process with CHATON_ALLOW_AUTOMATION_INSTANCE=1 and CHATON_DISABLE_DEVTOOLS=1 4. Inspect process state via Playwright Electron driver
expected_result: A real Electron app window should be created so the QA harness can drive the desktop UI
actual_result: The process reports app.isReady() = true, but BrowserWindow.getAllWindows() returns 0 and Playwright exposes no app pages
console_errors: No renderer page exists; process-level state from Electron driver: ready=true count=0 windows=[]
notes: Likely another startup path prevents createWindow() from completing under the Playwright Electron launcher. Need targeted instrumentation in electron/main.ts around app.whenReady() and createWindow().
